scenarios.capability: Apply Strategy pattern to eliminate an if/else chain
scenarios.reason: Agent produces a refactored TypeScript codebase with interface and strategy implementations — verifiable from file contents

scenarios.capability: Apply Adapter pattern to integrate an incompatible external API
scenarios.reason: Agent produces an adapter class and domain interface — verifiable by checking the adapter translates correctly

scenarios.capability: Apply Anti-Corruption Layer to isolate an external system's model from the domain
scenarios.reason: Agent produces a gateway/ACL class — verifiable by checking domain types are used internally and external types stay at the boundary

scenarios.capability: Apply Factory pattern to encapsulate conditional object creation
scenarios.reason: Agent produces a factory class and interface — verifiable from file contents

scenarios.capability: Evaluate pattern fit and correctly decide NOT to apply a pattern when cost exceeds benefit
scenarios.reason: Agent produces a written analysis recommending against pattern extraction — verifiable from the analysis document
